title: Foam Spheres Wet
features: A pack of 2 wet foam spheres.
Each Sphere is 16cm in diameter and used for a variety of floral displays.

Wet Foam is traditionally used with fresh cut or living flowers as it requires moisture to help the flower live for longer. Wet Foam should be immersed in water prior to use in order to gain the required moisture.
description: 16cm Wet Foam Sphere (2 pk) A pack of 2 wet foam spheres. Each Sphere is 16cm in diameter and used for a variety of floral displays. Wet Foam is traditionally used with fresh cut or living flowers as it requires moisture to help the flower live for longer. Wet Foam should be immersed in water prior to use in order to gain the required moisture. Perfect for use with Hanging Decorations Wedding Displays On top of columns or trees
